title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
